blocker.scope: Account Console Intraday Monitor route planning gate
blocker.reason: The /monitor primary workbench has route-level acceptance anchors but does not yet have an accepted proposal-level UI design, UI acceptance, read-model contract, deterministic fixtures, or browser acceptance plan. Per ADR-0045 contract-first UI rules, frontend implementation must wait.

missing_prerequisites: proposal-level Intraday Monitor README/phase plan with explicit read-only scope
read-model contract under contracts/ui/panels for active issues, stale streams, lag and incidents
deterministic fixtures under contracts/ui/fixtures/intraday_monitor for current, empty, blocked, stale and partial states
route coverage matrix update after the proposal gate is accepted
browser acceptance plan with stable selectors before implementation evidence
retry_conditions: Open or select a route-specific proposal such as P010 Intraday Monitor with explicit design and acceptance docs.
Add accepted read-only contracts and deterministic fixtures for active issues, stale streams, lag and incidents.
Run owner-boundary and proposal-doc gates after the contract/fixture gate is created.
Only then implement the smallest read-only /monitor UI slice and open the UI for user observation and acceptance.
